what_it_does: This file is a model card that documents the Ollama-hosted nomic-embed-text embedding model: its tag, size, architecture, embedding dimension, API endpoints, status, intended uses, quirks, open questions, and links to related models and runtime notes.
observations: The model tag is nomic-embed-text:latest and it runs through Ollama on port 11434.
It is a 262 MB quantised embedder with a 768-dimensional output.
Endpoints listed are http://localhost:11434/api/embeddings (Ollama native) and http://localhost:11434/v1/embeddings (OpenAI-compatible).
Status is available and registered system-wide with Ollama.
It was present before the substrate setup dated 2026-05-26.
The file positions it as a general dense text embedder accessible via the Ollama API path.
It notes the model is smaller and lower quality than bge-m3 and lives on a different port/runtime than the vLLM embedders.
Open questions include whether to keep or remove it, quality comparisons, and which Nomic version latest points at.
It links to _models-index, bge-m3, nomic-embed-code, and ../operations/ollama.
standouts: It is the Ollama-side default embedder documented in the models ledger.
Quantised 262 MB footprint with explicit quality caveats relative to bge-m3.
Hosted on a separate runtime and port from the vLLM-based embedders.
Contains unresolved decisions about retention and version identity.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with type, id, filename, status, runtime, port, date_added, and tags.
Follows a model-card structure: at-a-glance table, source, fits-these-needs, quirks, open-at-this-entry, connects-to.
Uses wiki-style backlinks such as [[_models-index]] and [[bge-m3]].
Breaks the predominant vLLM/embed-port pattern by documenting an Ollama registry model on port 11434.
concerns: Source note is vague: present-before-substrate-setup with no exact pull date or actor.
Quality comparison to bge-m3 is asserted but marked unverified.
The version behind nomic-embed-text:latest is unresolved.
Open question about keeping or removing the model suggests the entry itself is provisional.
notes: A small, Ollama-native embedding option recorded with clear caveats about runtime separation and unverified quality relative to the substrate's main embedder.
questions: When exactly was this model pulled and by which process?
Which Nomic model version does nomic-embed-text:latest currently resolve to?
What are the measured quality differences versus bge-m3 on representative tasks?
Is any current integration still depending on this Ollama embedder?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to document an available Ollama embedding model, and the file does exactly that through metadata, specs, use cases, and links.
apparent_themes: Explicit trade-off documentation between ubiquity and quality
Recording uncertainty and open decisions in the ledger
Separation of Ollama and vLLM embedding infrastructure
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to give the Ollama ecosystem an equally visible, honestly caveated embedding option in the same ledger as the vLLM-based embedders, while flagging that it may not be the preferred choice.
novelty: It documents a quantised, Ollama-distributed embedder that predates the substrate and uses both native and OpenAI-compatible endpoint paths, unlike the vLLM-hosted models.
contribution: It preserves the fact that a 768-dim quantised nomic-embed-text embedder is available via Ollama, records its endpoint paths, size, runtime port, and caveats, so a fused system can decide which runtime-appropriate embedder to use.
summary_for_embedding: A model card for the Ollama-hosted nomic-embed-text:latest quantised dense text embedder, exposing 768-dimensional embeddings on localhost:11434 via native and OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an Ollama-based embedding option alongside other substrate embedders, noting its runtime, size, and quality trade-offs.
